data.title: Everything we learned from powering 20% of the Internet—yours by default
data.summary: Welcome to Cloudflare - Powering the next generation of applications
headings: Everything we learned from powering 20% of the Internet—yours by default
One network for users, apps, and data
paragraphs:
One platform for your apps, agents, and workforce.
Build, secure, and scale without managing infrastructure.
One smart network for workloads + security — close to users, close to data.
Compute close to users reduces network latency.
Smart Placement moves your Worker closer to your data for optimized end-to-end latency.
Faster for 95% of round trips by running Workers near your backend, not you.
95% of the world’s Internet-connected population is reached by Cloudflare within 50ms.
Security, connectivity, and code run in 335+ cities around the world, within 50ms of 95% of the world's population.
Our network is close to your users, applications, and sites. It optimizes all your traffic from source to destination for low latency.
Duncan Davidson, VP of Developer Productivity, Shopify
Everything needed tobuild secure, performant applications
data.description: Welcome to Cloudflare - Powering the next generation of applications
